instanceSettings.errorDisableMany: Failed to disable {{failed}} of {{total}} timer heartbeats. First error: {{detail}}
instanceSettings.title: Scheduler Heartbeats
instanceSettings.subtitle: Agents with a timer heartbeat enabled across all of your companies.
instanceSettings.confirmDisableAllOne: Disable timer heartbeats for all {{count}} enabled agent?
instanceSettings.confirmDisableAllMany: Disable timer heartbeats for all {{count}} enabled agents?
instanceSettings.emptyState: No scheduler heartbeats match the current criteria.

instanceGeneralSettings.heading: General
instanceGeneralSettings.description: Configure instance-wide defaults that affect how operator-visible logs are displayed.
instanceGeneralSettings.censorDescription: Hide the username segment in home-directory paths and similar operator-visible log output. Standalone username mentions outside of paths are not yet masked in the live transcript view. This is off by default.

instanceExperimental.title: Experimental
instanceExperimental.description: Opt into features that are still being evaluated before they become default behavior.
instanceExperimental.isolatedWorkspacesDescription: Show execution workspace controls in project configuration and allow isolated workspace behavior for new and existing issue runs.
instanceExperimental.autoRestartDescription: In `pnpm dev:once`, wait for all queued and running local agent runs to finish, then restart the server automatically when backend changes or migrations make the current boot stale.
